strengths: Extensive 15+ years of full-stack engineering experience across cloud, AI, and infrastructure domains
Proven AI-agent and agentic workflow contributions at re:cinq, aligning with AI strategy focus
Demonstrated entrepreneurial initiative through GISCollective and open-source tooling, showing innovation and leadership
concerns: No explicit evidence of master’s or PhD in AI-related field, missing preferred academic credential
Limited documentation of direct cloud platform design (e.g., AWS/GCP/Azure) or AI product shipping at scale
German language proficiency is basic, potentially limiting customer-facing strategic advisory in EU market
response.justification: Bogdan exceeds the 15-year experience requirement with deep full-stack and AI-agent work, plus proven innovation via open-source platforms and tooling. His current role at re:cinq directly aligns with AI strategy responsibilities. However, the absence of an advanced AI degree and limited visibility into large-scale cloud AI product delivery are notable gaps, though not disqualifying given his hands-on technical impact.
